content.rendered: A supplemental post to 101 Digital Marketing & Fundraising Best Practices for Nonprofits, these website statistics can guide your nonprofit in creating and maintaining a website that maximizes the user experience and fundraising success.

excerpt.rendered: A supplemental post to 101 Digital Marketing & Fundraising Best Practices for Nonprofits, these 2025 website statistics can guide your nonprofit in creating and maintaining a website that maximizes the user experience and fundraising success.
